kept.text:
Cloudflare has labeled the domain of Russia’s state-backed MAX messenger as spyware due to its extensive tracking and data collection. 

The app is being promoted as a national super app to replace blocked foreign platforms. 
Reports indicate it is now mandatory for accessing medical services, financial transactions, and even school grades. 

MAX operates more as a centralized surveillance infrastructure than a privacy-focused tool. 

It shows how Russia is monitoring their people.

profile_bio.description: Tech & gaming analysis with the latest updates | TV & Films | alt: @piratnation | Official @skinscom Affiliate

kept.text:
Introduce yet another framework for Cloudflare Workers, "Workers Routes"

The one Worker handles all requests. And dispatch another Worker based on the file path. It runs in the Dynamic Worker independently

The bundled file size can be minimal. It can scale infinity https://t.co/dE68yqMRo4
